title: Fantasy Races
description: Adds some stereotypical fantasy races such as elves and dwarves to origins. Also replaces the default origins.
body:
# **In very active development. Expect game breaking bugs.**
At some point I will remove the alpha flag

# Human
Jack of all trades, master of none. Humans make up for their lack of specialisation with adaptability, stubbornness, and sheer numbers.

# Elf
Elves move like wind through leaves — graceful, ancient, and usually convinced they’re better than you. Their magic is instinct, not study.

# Dwarf
Built like the mountains they love: short, solid, and immovable. Dwarves value craftsmanship, grudges, and a good brew — in that order.

# Orc
Orcs are creatures of passion — whether in battle, song, or feasting. Their strength is as raw as the lands they hail from.

# Hafling
Curious, cheerful, and underestimated. Halflings slip under trouble and out again with a grin and a pocketful of treasure.

# Giant
Giants are living legends, walking hills that speak slowly and crush boulders without noticing. They often forget how small the rest of the world is.

# Fae
Fae are beautiful and dangerous, like lightning in a bottle. Tricksters by nature, they walk between worlds with a flicker and a smirk.
